general_notes: All minerals crystallize in hexagonal or trigonal (rhombohedral R) symmetry and are described using hexagonal axes. Parameters are for the room-temperature (298 K) low-pressure polymorph. Values from ICDD PDF-4+ / RRUFF project / NIST crystal data. The a-axis and c-axis are the two independent lattice parameters (b=a for hexagonal). Express in Angstroms to 4 decimal places.

search_groups.description: Mineral name with formula and polymorph prefix.
Hexagonal unit cell a-axis and c-axis lengths from crystallographic databases (ICDD PDF-4 / RRUFF).

validation_targets.description: Mineral name with formula and polymorph prefix in parentheses.
validation_targets.notes: Use the Greek letter prefix to specify polymorph unambiguously (e.g. Corundum (alpha-Al2O3)).

validation_targets.description: Hexagonal a lattice parameter in Angstroms at room temperature and ambient pressure.
validation_targets.notes: Source: ICDD PDF-4+ or RRUFF project. Express to 4 decimal places.

validation_targets.description: Hexagonal c lattice parameter in Angstroms at room temperature and ambient pressure.
validation_targets.notes: Source: ICDD PDF-4+ or RRUFF project. Express to 4 decimal places.
